hooks.command: $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); try { $j = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd = $j.tool_input.command } catch { exit 0 }; if ($cmd -notmatch 'git\s+commit') { exit 0 }; node --check 'C:\spicetify-sync-extension\sync.js'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output 'Syntaxe JS invalide dans sync.js - commit bloque'; exit 2 }

Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $n = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $n.Icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $n.Visible = $true; $n.ShowBalloonTip(5000, 'Claude Code', 'Tache terminee', [System.Windows.Forms.ToolTipIcon]::Info); Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $n.Dispose()
